items.title: Why American Express (AXP) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
items.description: American Express (AXP) closed at $311.21 in the latest trading session, marking a +1.1% move from the prior day.

items.title: Airline stocks hit turbulence amid Mideast conflict: Latest news
items.description: US airline stocks faced slight headwinds in Wednesday's trading session in response to the recent escalations between the US and Iran, compounded by the jolt in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F). Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Pras Subramanian for a chat about the latest headlines emerging from the airline industry today, including United Airlines' (UAL) new headphone rule and the airport lounge American Express (AXP) opened in Las Vegas. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: American Express Updates First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Date and Plans to Host Live Audio Webcast of Annual Meeting of Shareholders
items.description: NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) today has announced that it has adjusted the date of its first-quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call to Thursday, April 23, 2026, from Friday, April 24, 2026, previously.

items.title: American Express Expands on Its Sports Portfolio With New Partnerships
items.description: The global payments company has inked new payments partnerships across the NFL, MLS and NWLS.

items.title: In 2024, Warren Buffett Highlighted 8 "Forever" Holdings -- and His Successor, Greg Abel, Just Added 2 New Stocks to the List
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway's new boss believes these brand-name stocks "will compound over decades."
